name: China Shipbuilding Industry Company Limited
summary: China Shipbuilding Industry Company Limited engages in the shipbuilding and ship support, ship equipment, ship repair, marine engineering equipment, energy transportation equipment, and other businesses in China. It offers low-to-medium speed diesel products, propulsion and transmission devices, diesel engine components, deck and cabin machineries, and oil and sewage treatment equipment, as well as engages in marine casting and forging activities. The company is also involved in the research and development, manufacture, modification, and repair of oil tankers, container ships, bulk carriers, special vessels, and various other ships. In addition, it engages in marine engineering activities comprising drilling platforms, drilling vessels, FPSOs, offshore special vessels, various offshore modules, offshore facilities, offshore supporting equipment, and marine engineering equipment. Further, the company offers ship-borne weapons and equipment, which include diesel engine and components, ship-borne weapons launchers, and navigation devices for ships; and communication equipment, military reinforcement computers, and transmission devices for military ships. Additionally, it produces equipment in the energy transportation fields, such as wind power gear boxes, paddles, wind power yaw devices, nuclear power emergency generators, nuclear power plant water treatment systems, rail equipment, subway equipment, urban light rail equipment, railway wagons, engineering special vehicles, special trucks, and other transportation equipment. The company is based in Kunming, China.
